atomic_facts.fact: The clip shows a black and white microscopic view of a device on skin followed by a credits slide.
The credits identify the creator as Dr. Gergely Takács.
The equipment listed is a Keyence VW-9000 High Speed Video Microscope.
A logo with the letters 'gt.' appears in the bottom right corner.

atomic_facts.fact: The video displays a credits screen listing Dr. Gergely Takács as the creator.
Szilárd Izsák is credited for idea and assistance.
The equipment used is identified as a Keyence VW-9000 High Speed Video Microscope.
The Slovak University of Technology in Bratislava, Faculty of Mechanical Engineering is listed.
The website www.gergelytakacs.com is displayed at the end.
